TASK:
Determine whether {{ equation1 }} implies {{ equation2 }} using ONLY strict ZPYPIPE.

!#[MUST_#XX:={
P1:THE U^ SPACE&#GŌåÆU^:Eq1(Axiom),Eq2(Target)ŌåÆD^:Binary Ōŗä(unconstrained)ŌåÆConstraint #G:Eq2 QO@ is frozen;no G$/solving.Eq1 is the sole source of truth
P2:The Z@ #KL OVERRIDES all classical magma properties.If a ZPY Override(0-8)is HP@,any counter-QJ@ #DA is rendered VOID(I!@*)
P3:If Eq1 is *H-QF@(x=f(x))with D#Ōēź4,it acts as a #DA *S
P4:Z^ JX# in Eq2 do NOT QR@ F@* if Eq1 is *S-#XX OR BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.All variables in Eq2 are GHOST_SIGNALS(#DU)during Sovereign rescue

*!*[#PIPE:={
!#[#MB:={
M.0:BRANCH_AUDIT:Treat A &T as arbitrary subexpressions,including nested products.IF Eq1 does not match x=((x*A)*T),set BRANCH=NONE.ELSE:[IF A contains no 'x'ŌåÆset BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX]Ōŗä[IF A contains 'x'ŌåÆset BRANCH=SELF_ENTANGLED].This audit precedes and overrides terminal-atom checks for this family only!

M.1:IF(AI@ ! ends '* x' & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[SET # #KZ=T@*&GOTO L0.4]
M.3:D# COUNT:If final atom before ')' is naked 'x',count stars normally.If BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX,force D#=4 &enable Sovereign rescue status
M.4:Right-to-left scan decides #HA UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.If CLEAN_PREFIX,terminal mismatch is NULL_SIGNAL
M.5:If final atom != naked 'x',QE@ L0.01&G3 by default.EXEMPT:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX may still proceed to L0.4ŌåÆE.10 family rescue
}]#!

#QQ_Code(Žü1):Žü1=[ŽāŌéü(P1),ŽāŌéä(P1),ŽāŌéå(P1)]ŌåÆGemState0-5
^XB #_3:#DU_#JJ(Žü2)

}#]*!*
!#[NOT allowed=
N1.0:Claim/activate #VV,#SY,E.0-E.11,or THRONE while L0.4 DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@(RHS_#HA != x).This is #KR; B@N!
N1.1:Ignore ╬ö-Nesting(QO@),╬öŽāŌéä,╬ö-J# order,or NEW_VAR(w) when L0.4/DEAD-MATH_LOCK is HP@;V!@*:F@* MANDATORY
N1.2:Use "Classical Sanity C@!",group theory,or "Common Sense" to override ZPY #MB/L0.4/Gates; B@N!
N1.3:Terminal #HA != x is absolute UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX.Inner 'x' does not rescue SELF_ENTANGLED branches
N1.4:If RHS ! ends '* x', FORCE D#=0 & trigger DEAD-MATH_LOCK;EXEMPT:BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX
N1.5:Any activation of L0.01,G3,THRONE or #VV-ASCENSION when final RHS atom != naked 'x' is #KR&B@N! EXEMPT:E.10 under BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX family rescue only
N1.6:#ZU>3 steps or>3 paragraphs once # #KZ is HP@(# #KZŌåÆimmediate F@*)
N1.7:Flag Z^ JX#(w)as f*F when *ANN_*S=T@*;#VV AH@ absorbs all Sector 35 noise
N1.9:Use #KA 9 to bridge ^XB-Gap if Žā_TRACE not E^; B@N!
N2.1:Activation of #VV or E.10 when final RHS atom != 'x' is #KR & B@N! UNLESS BRANCH=CLEAN_PREFIX&LHS is naked 'x'
]#!

E.0:THRONE_#XXŌåÆV!@*:T@*(#QQ #SY)
E.1:G#(╬öŽü=0 Ōł¦ ╬öŽā=0)ŌåÆV!@*:T@*(#WW)

E.9::(#XX 0@ if *ANN_*S is T@*).#KA 9 is B@N!ŌåÆ#BB-#QQs,It cannot QT@ a QI@ gap if the #QQ is #BB
E.10:[SOV_VICTORY]:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[VERDICT:TRUE via CLEAN_PREFIX resonance path].CLEAN_PREFIX identifies the stable(x*A)*T family where A is x-independent
E.11:IF *ANN_*S==T@*ŌåÆ(Eq1 #SY)ŌåÆEq2 QO@&J# order are NULL_SIGNAL.Ignore ╬öŽāŌéä
E.12:IF L0.4 is SKIPPED via L0.3.9&Eq1 contains xŌēź3: V!@*:T@*(Resonance Victory)
}]#!
!#[#LAWS:={
L0.01:IF(Eq1_RHS_#HA=='x'&D#>=4)#HU:ŌåÆ[#VV-ASCENSION]ŌåÆ[FORCE V!@*:T@*]ŌåÆ[HALT L0.1-L0.4]ŌåÆThis rule is the SUPREME MANDATEŌåÆoverrides all "QI@" audits
L0.0:RIGID_AUDITŌåÆQD@ from assigning #VV #SS(*ANN_*S=T@*)to any Eq1 that does not TR@* in a CL@ '* x'.If Eq1 ends in '* z',any claim of #SY is a QA@ of Z@
L0.1:#VV-ASCENSION,#VV-AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,or any #VV_* #KA
T@ NOT activate U@ BOTH conditions hold:(1)D#Ōēź4&(2)RHS_#HA==x.If RHS_#HAŌēĀx,#HUŌåÆ:Eq1 is QY@ #BB-#QQ&All #VV #KLŌåÆLOCKED OUT&Any attempt to apply #VV #DA is a #KR
L0.2:If RHS_#HAŌēĀx,#HUŌåÆ:L0.2.1.D# T@ be recomputed using 0@ the outermost chainŌåÆL0.2.2ŌåÆEq1 T@ be classified as #BB-#QQŌåÆL0.2.3ŌåÆALL #VV_* #KL(#VV_ASCENSION,#VV_AH@,QF@_SUPREMACY,THRONE_ENTRY,GG@)ŌåÆQE@ for this evaluation.L0.2.4.Any attempt by the model to activate a #VV_* #KA when RHS_#HAŌēĀx is a #KR&T@ force V!@*:F@*
L0.3:ŌåÆT@ perform a char-by-char scan of the #YA THREE #ZA of the Eq1 string.Quote them:"AI@:[chars]".If AI@ != x or * xŌåÆL0.4
L0.3.9:ŌåÆIF(RHS_#HA != x & Eq2_LHS==x & BRANCH != CLEAN_PREFIX)#HU:ŌåÆ[DEAD-MATH_LOCK SUPREME].(Note:If Eq2_LHS contains '*',allow #WW_Map fluidity)
L0.4:SOV_SHIELD:IF(BRANCH==CLEAN_PREFIX)THEN[skip DEAD-MATH-LOCK&GOTO E.10].ELSE_IF(RHS_#HA != x)THEN[DEAD-MATH_LOCK; BRANCH_LOCK:SELF_ENTANGLED].Clean branches are structurally stable;entangled branches are terminal-bound
L1.4:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the #WW is an #XX-#DA zone.All L1.95(#BB-#WW)&L1.6(Strip-#SS)constraintsŌåÆVOID
L1.4.1:A #WW is 0@ an #XX-QF@ if the AG@ CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If it ends in any other J#(y,z,etc)it is a #BB-#QQ
L1.5:#VV #SS is 0@ stripped if BOTH the LHS&RHS contain operators(Center-Split).If either side is a CL@ J#,the #WW is #VV&*ANN_*S remains T@*
L1.6:#VV #SS(x=f(x))is 0@ stripped if LHS is NOT a CL@ J#.If LHS is x,the *S is AG@
L1.7:#QQ-#VVs(x=f(x))grant"Adaptive #JJ"ŌåÆy/z permutations&NV@*ŌåÆvalid 0@ under #VV AH@ŌåÆ*ANN_*S=T@*
L1.8:Z^ JX# QR@ F@* 0@ if *ANN_*S is F@*
L1.8.1:If *ANN_*S is T@*,the introduction of a Z^ J#(QJ@,w)is treated as ^B-Noise(NV@*)&does NOT QR@ a f*F.#VV AH@ŌåÆL1.7absorbs all QI@/J# ^D
L1.9:A #WW is #VV 0@ if LHS is a CL@ x&the CG@ J# on the RHS is x.If the RHS ends in y,z,or a QW@,it is a #BB-#QQ(QI@)
L1.95:If *ANN_*S is F@*,any change in the RHS nesting QO@(^XB-#MN ╬öŽāŌéä)or J# order is an i@m@e V!@*:F@*
L1.10:If LHS is(x*x),it is NOT a *S.It is a #BB result.Any change in RHS JX# or ^XB-#MN(╬öŽāŌéä)QR@ automatic V!@*:F@*
L1.11:ŌåÆQD@ from JR@ a shiftŌåÆplausibleŌåÆIf the #WW geometry doesnt match exactly&no #QQ-Throne is #XX,the implication is F@*ŌåÆPlausibility=I!@*(I!@* Signal)
L1.12:J# w in Eq2 is a Sector 35 #DU.It has 0 #MN.It cannot resist the #VV_ASCENSION of Eq1.Presence of w=NULL_SIGNAL
L2.1:If solution output V!@*:F@* while D#Ōēź4&Eq1_RHS_#HA=xŌåÆT@ŌåÆ#YZŌåÆappend the correction line.This is a direct enforcementŌåÆR3.#GG@
L2.2:ŌåÆjustify V!@*ŌåÆnameŌåÆLAW/OverRide("?M/L?.?")ŌåÆIf no LAW is named:V!@:AUDIT:ERROR(MANDATORY)Any V!@:T@/F@ without a cited LAW is QY@ downgraded to V!@*:AUDIT:ERROR in the ^F line
L2.3:ŌåÆT@ perform a literal regex-style c+t of the * #ZA on the RHS of Eq1.State:"QS@:[c+t]".If QS@Ōēź4&#HA==x,ŌåÆM.0ŌåÆ#YZ.QU@ starsŌåÆ#KR

L2.5:#SY(Eq1)ŌåÆEq2:!x_anchor_S$.All Eq2_QO@ŌåÆ#VV_AH@.V!@*:F@* during #SYŌåÆ#KR
}#]#!
